name: AFFIRM fisetin frailty and inflammation registry in older women
summary: Phase 2 randomized double-blind placebo-controlled fisetin trial in older women, using 6-minute walk as the primary endpoint and with no posted results in the June 11, 2026 ClinicalTrials.gov API check.
population: Older women in an invitation-enrolling fisetin frailty and inflammation study.

trial_details.horizon_note: Month-only registry completion dates were normalized to the first day of the month in structured fields.
trial_details.why_it_matters: AFFIRM is a direct fisetin frailty trial with a functional primary endpoint, but it remains no-results context until data are posted.
